name: STM32G431 WLCSP49
description: Generated from the STM32G431 alternate-function workbook and STM32G431x6/x8/xB datasheet for STM32G431 WLCSP49. This definition models the WLCSP49 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32G431 devices pair an Arm Cortex-M4 core with FPU running at up to 170 MHz with up to 128 Kbytes of flash memory and 32 Kbytes of SRAM, including CCM SRAM. They integrate rich analog peripherals, advanced motor-control timers, FDCAN, USB full-speed, and UCPD support. This package definition exposes 40 peripheral blocks covering 8 timers, 1 low-power timer, 5 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 3 I2S interfaces, 3 I2C controllers, 1 serial audio interface, 1 FDCAN controller, 2 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 3 on-chip operational amplifiers, 4 ultra-low-power comparators, 1 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controller, and 1 USB interface.
